rows.label: qev092506_MSG0001
rows.name:
How goes the mission? Are you
finding the materials for the
Doll flight module all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you're stuck, I can share
the intel Tatsu scrounged up.
So what do you need help with?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Lin about the upgraded coil part.

rows.label: qev092506_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Lin about the light-speed jet fin.

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0003
rows.name:
Tatsu said you could get those from oc-servs,
the Growth weapons patrolling the bridge in
the Southern Cinderdunes of White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Then he said he'd leave the rest to
you and ran off like a massive chicken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0005
rows.name:
Useless when it really
counts—that's our Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0006
rows.name:
Tatsu said you could get one from
aetrygons, the piscinoid indigens
around Valley of Oblivion's King's Falls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0007
rows.name:
So at least he got you
a location, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0008
rows.name:
But as soon as he heard aetrygons were ferocious
carnivores, he started making excuses about
not wanting to get involved any deeper.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm sure he's napping or goofing off
about now. Honestly, he's hopeless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0010
rows.name:
I've double-checked and triple-checked up
to the very last minute. I can guarantee
nothing's hooked up backward this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092506_MSG0011
rows.name:
You're set to make a beeline for the
wild blue yonder. Time to take flight![ST:wait ]
